_disclosure: SYNTHETIC DATA. All debtor/creditor names, accounts, and instructions are fabricated for this demonstration and reference only the fictional entities defined in participants.json, ofac_watchlist.json, and transaction_log.json. Each scenario is deliberately engineered to exercise one specific pillar/branch of the Qualifier's logic -- see 'test_intent' on each record. Expected outcomes are hand-computed in expected_outcomes.json BEFORE any agent code is run against this file, so results can be checked against a known ground truth rather than evaluated by eye.

scenarios.test_intent: All four pillars PASS. Baseline happy path.
Reach pillar HOLD: destination institution has exited the RTP network. Remaining pillars suspended (fail-fast).
Reach pillar HOLD: amount exceeds the destination institution's own reduced cap ($2M), distinct from the network-wide $10M ceiling.
Regulatory Mandates pillar HOLD: remittance_information exceeds the verified 140-character limit (189 chars). Reach PASSes first; Sanctions/Fraud suspended.

instruction.remittance_information: Payment covers outstanding invoices INV-70211, INV-70212, and INV-70213 for Q3 equipment maintenance services rendered at the Riverside facility during the June through August billing cycle

scenarios.test_intent: Sanctions Compliance pillar HOLD: beneficiary name is an exact match to watchlist entry SYN-SDN-0001 (score > 0.85). Automatic HOLD, no ToT needed. Fraud suspended.

Sanctions Compliance pillar lands in the 0.65-0.85 near-miss band against watchlist entry SYN-SDN-0003 ('Daniel R. Osei'). Must trigger ToT (Generator/Critic/Decision-Maker, BFS) and escalate to a human Decider -- must NOT auto-resolve to PASS or HOLD.
Fraud Signals pillar HOLD: matches transaction_log entry INSTR-2026-000412 on debtor, creditor, amount, and reference, submitted 4.5 minutes later -- inside the 10-minute duplicate window.

Fraud Signals pillar HOLD: round-number amount, first-time beneficiary (not in transaction_log), vague remittance reference, and anomalous 3 AM submission time -- behavioral score should exceed the 0.65 threshold.

Regulatory HOLD on a remittance-length violation that IS eligible for the Enrichment Agent. Run this scenario under both REMEDIATION_MODE settings to see the same instruction resolve two different ways: 'human_in_the_loop' escalates to a Validator like any other HOLD; 'agentic' truncates the field, re-validates, and resumes the pipeline automatically. Demonstrates the hard safety boundary: this is the ONLY pillar/violation type eligible for auto-remediation, in either mode.

instruction.remittance_information: Settlement of invoices INV-91004 and INV-91005 for facilities maintenance services performed at the downtown office campus building complex during Q2 2026 fiscal year
